constructors: MICS6814(co_pin, nh3_pin, no2_pin, vref, load_resistor, samples)
examples:
from mics6814 import MICS6814

gas = MICS6814(co_pin=26, nh3_pin=27, no2_pin=28)

readings = gas.read_all()
print(readings)
# CO: 12345.67 Ohms
# NH3: 23456.78 Ohms
# NO2: 34567.89 Ohms

print(gas.read_co())
print(gas.read_nh3())
print(gas.read_no2())
